title: Release Gates, Capacity, Compliance, Migration, Rollback, and Defense · Runtime Lens: Release Migration Gates
summary: The candidate passes fixture tests but lacks owner signoff, load evidence, privacy review, parser migration proof, rollback rehearsal, residual-risk ownership, and support documentation. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the release migration gates increment in production crawler evidence and recovery defense. Learners progress…
objectives: Gate immutable artifacts, dependency and parser changes, schemas, checkpoints, clean installs, canaries, monitoring, stop controls, rollback, and restore.
Obtain accountable owner, privacy, security, accessibility, data, legal-review, operations, and target-site approvals with expiry and revocation paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-release-recovery-defense-2
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-release-recovery-defense-2.
# Case 7417: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def worked_scraper_release_recovery_defense_2(release_gates: int = 16, passed_gates: int = 16, rehearsed_failures: int = 8, open_critical_findings: int = 0, owner_pause_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorizationworked2",
        "url7417",
        "response2dekrow",
        "treeworked27417",
        "frontier7417worked2",
        "report2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if release_gates < 12 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_failures < 6 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "recovery-gap"
    if owner_pause_seconds < 0 or owner_pause_seconds > 60:
        return False, owner_pause_seconds, "owner-stop-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-crawler-production"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Build Release Migration Gates evidence · Theory Release Migration Ga…
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-release-migration-gates-117ndi" that uses case 2473 to defend end-to-end correctness, capacity, accountable approvals, migration, owner pause, rollback, recovery, and residual risk. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Build Release Migration Gates evidence · Theory Release Migration Ga….

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-release-migration-gates-117ndi
# Competency: scraper-release-migration-gates.
# Case 2473: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: personal data must remain minimized and redacted.
# Changed case: replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget.
def evidence_scraper_release_migration_gates_117ndi(release_gates: int = 16, passed_gates: int = 16, rehearsed_failures: int = 8, open_critical_findings: int = 0, owner_pause_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_117ndi = "117ndi-idn711-2473"
    assert evidence_variant_117ndi
    evidence_axes_117ndi = (
        "authorization117ndi",
        "url2473",
        "responseidn711",
        "tree117ndi2473",
        "frontier2473117ndi",
        "reportidn7112473",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_117ndi)) == 6
    if release_gates < 12 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_failures < 6 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "recovery-gap"
    if owner_pause_seconds < 0 or owner_pause_seconds > 60:
        return False, owner_pause_seconds, "owner-stop-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-crawler-production"

checks.pattern: # Evidence: scraper-release-migration-gates-117ndi(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_scraper_release_migration_gates_117ndi\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?release_gates < 12 or passed_gates < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?passed_gates != release_gates)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?rehearsed_failures < 6 or open_critical_findings > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?owner_pause_seconds < 0 or owner_pause_seconds > 60)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
